name: Céline Dion
abstract: Céline Marie Claudette Dion (born 30 March 1968) is a Canadian singer, entrepreneur and philanthropist. Dubbed the "Queen of Power Ballads", she is known for her powerful, technically skilled vocals and commercially successful works, which have had a significant impact on popular music.

about_quotes.speaker: Marian McPartland
about_quotes.evidence: Whether or not you’re going to start playing a Celine Dion tune from The Titanic, at least you should know it exists.
about_quotes.doc_title: Marian McPartland — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Paul Shaffer
about_quotes.evidence: we look at some of the huge impactful artists. In my day we had Lightfoot, Gordon Lightfoot, The Guess Who.
about_quotes.doc_title: Paul Shaffer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, August 24, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Jerry Hey
about_quotes.evidence: even if you’re Celine Dion or Whitney Houston or anything, it’s David is in charge there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jerry Hey interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, November 2, 2023
